name: NTLM Brute Force
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jerry Shockley '@jsh0x'
SIGMA Title: NTLM Brute Force
SIGMA Description: Detects common NTLM brute force device names

False positives:
- Systems with names equal to the spoofed ones used by the brute force tools

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=8004 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rdesktop%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remmina%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%freerdp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows7%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows8%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows2012%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows2016%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows2019%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY NTLM Brute Force on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=8004 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rdesktop%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remmina%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%freerdp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows7%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows8%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows2012%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows2016%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows2019%') AQL filter query
